name: PCC TimeBot
description: Time submission web app (React SPA + Go API) with email magic-link auth.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (provided by Heroku Postgres).

SMTP_USERNAME.description: SMTP account username used to send timecard and sign-in emails.

APP_BASE_URL.description: Public base URL of the app, used to build magic-link URLs (e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com).

APP_ENV.description: Set to 'prod' on Heroku. Use 'dev' locally to disable Secure cookies.

CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins. Only needed when the SPA is served from a different origin (local dev). Leave empty in production since the SPA is same-origin.
